title: viola × ausonensis
intro: Viola × ausonensis, also known as the Austrian violet or Marsh violet, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Violaceae family and is a cross between the Viola altaica and Viola mirabilis species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola × ausonensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
